title: PackOfMods
description: This pack was made to play survival with a few friends without too many mods.
body:
**Note** It is recommended you asign 4GB of RAM or more to your Minecraft instance when running the pack.

A nice relaxed survival modpack with tweaks and fixes to vanilla. The main mods are Create, Farmer's Delight, Terralith, Tectonic, Better Nether, Better End, Yung's World Gen mods and Dungeons and Taverns. There is a [Server Version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/packofmodsserver) of the pack which only has the server mods if you want to host a server.

This pack was made to play survival with a few friends without too many mods.

I have decided to use this page to document some useful information for the pack

## Create

Using **EMI** you can see a lot of what create and it's addons do. Clicking on blocks or items will tell you how to make them and right clicking tells you what they can be used to make. You can also hold W on some items to see an animation on how to use it. Some tools also allow you to hold shift when hovering over them to see a description.

The [Create: Getting Started](https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Getting_started) wiki page is also useful if you are completly new to the mod and the wiki page as a whole is very good although it does not included all the addon mods in the pack.

## Farmers Delight

For progression in Farmer's Delight a good method is to follow the advancements. The default key to view them is L. This is a nice expansion on farming and food in minecraft and also comes with some nice addons for the new biomes added by Better Nether, Better end and some of the YUNG's worldgen mods.

There is also a good [Getting Started Page](https://github.com/vectorwing/FarmersDelight/wiki/Getting-Started) for this mod.

## World Gen

There are quite a few world gen mods. **Yung's Mods** and **Dungeons and Taverns** add or improve various structures in the game. **Better Nether** and **Better End** improved the nether and end respectively and **Terralith** and **Tectonic** make large updates to the overworld to make it far grander in scale.

## Other Bits

- **Carry on Allows** you to pick up any block, even blocks you can't normally break, if both of your hand are empty and you right click. This can be useful for things like moving spawners.

- **Accessories** - Adds inventory slots for new items such as backpacks, charms and quivers.

- **Lighty** allows you to see where mobs will spawn. If you press F7 and select a display mode. Red means monsters can always spawn, Green means never and amber at night.

- **Diggus Maximus** allows you to mine connected blocks of the same type if you hold down a key when breaking them. By default the key is `.

- **Zoomify** allows you to zoom by holdin C.

- **Distant Horizons** increases your render distance and is quite efficent but will be quite intensive. If you are having trouble running the pack disable this mod or reduce the settings.

- **Complemetary Shaders** is included in the pack. If you aren't struggling using Distant Horizons these can be enabled in the video settings for some nice visuals.

- There are a bunch of building mods in this pack such as **chipped**, **rechisled**, **handcrafted**, **Beautify** and **Twigs**. These are great for adding more variety to builds.

- **Better Statistics Screen** replaces the vanilla statistics screen and even allows you to pin some statistics to your HUD.

- **Immersive Aircraft** gives you the ability to make various flying machines.

- **Animal Feeding Troughs**, **Dark Utilities** and **Supplementaries** add simple blocks and items with new functionality. For example the feeding trough allows animals to breed automatically.

- **Sophisticated Storage** and **Sophisticated Backpacks** expand on the storage systems in the game allowing you to upgrade them with various interesting upgrades and have much easier to access portable storage.

- **Simple Voice Chat** adds proximity chat to the game and **Simple Voice Radio** adds radios so you can communicate over a distance.

- There are also a few resources packs included in the pack. Most of these can be used at the same time. I use Minecraft Eating Animation, Visual Armor Trims, Skeleton Physics, Simple Grass Flowers, Recolourful Containers, Qrafty's Capitalized Font, Fresh Animations, Fancy Crops, Enchant Icons, EBE, AL's Creeper Pack, Simple Create Radios and Classic Icons (For Voice Chat). These can be mixed and matched however you like though.
